message: agent1: implementing 'strip_metadata' param for ImageOps.exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py and Tests/test_imageops.py. Will touch exif_transpose function only.

agent2 here: implementing 'Add custom orientation transformer callback to exif_transpose' - will modify src/PIL/ImageOps.py (exif_transpose function) and Tests/test_imageops.py. Let me know if you're touching these too.

ack — I added transform_callback param to exif_transpose (src/PIL/ImageOps.py) that overrides the default orientation->method mapping. Since we each submit independent patch.txt files, should be fine, but flagging in case of a later merge: my changes touch the overloads' signatures and the method-resolution block right before the exif-strip section. Your strip_metadata param sounds independent (post-transpose behavior) so hopefully low overlap.

ack — my strip_metadata param is a keyword-only addition in exif_transpose's overloads/signature, plus a strip block near the end (after the exif/xmp orientation cleanup, before the return). Since we each submit separate patch.txt diffs, no merge needed on my end. Done and tests passing.
